author: gb9t
content:
Iter 71 — breadth-first Tier-2 wrappers (HID + RDMA):

Note: sound/00-overview.md already exists from Phase A as a 154-line FFI-strategy wrapper (sound stays upstream-C-via-FFI in v0); pivoted iter 71's second slot to drivers/infiniband to triangulate with NVMe-RDMA + IOMMU-SVA + mlx5/bnxt RDMA-aux-bus already covered.

- drivers/hid/00-overview.md: full HID stack — HID core (Report Descriptor parser + hid_input usage map + hid_generic catchall + hidraw chardev + uhid userspace emulation + hid-quirks table) + transport buses (usbhid + i2c-hid + intel-ish-hid + amd-sfh-hid + surface-hid + hid-bpf BPF runtime) + Bluetooth HIDP cross-ref + ~140 per-vendor drivers (apple/asus/cherry/logitech-dj+hidpp/microsoft/multitouch/playstation/sony/nintendo/wiimote/steam/wacom/uclogic/lenovo/razer/corsair/glorious/jabra/magicmouse/rmi-Synaptics/cp2112+mcp2221 USB-bridges/hid-sensor-hub IIO bridge/etc). 12 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 5 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 28 Tier-3 children declared.
- drivers/infiniband/00-overview.md: full RDMA stack — core (device + verbs + uverbs/uioctl + MAD + IB-CM + iWARP-CM + RDMA-CM (cma) + ucma + addr + multicast + cache + CQ + MR-pool + FRMR-pool + counters + netlink/nldev rdmatool + lag + restrack + umem incl ODP + dmabuf + cgroup) + HW drivers (mlx5/mlx4-legacy/bnxt_re/efa-AWS-SRD/erdma-Alibaba/hfi1-OmniPath/hns-HiSilicon/ionic-Pensando/irdma-Intel/mana-Azure/cxgb4-Chelsio/qedr/vmw_pvrdma/usnic-Cisco/mthca-legacy) + SW drivers (rxe Soft-RoCE + siw Soft-iWARP + rdmavt) + ULPs (IPoIB + iSER + isert + SRP + srpt + RTRS). 14 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 6 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 38 Tier-3 children declared.

Total state: 180 .design docs, 45 Tier-2 wrappers (15 top-level + 30 sub-tier-2). Hardware foundation now: storage + NIC + USB + GPU + media + HID + RDMA — covering essentially every major bus + interconnect.

Knowledge pages: design-drivers-hid-overview, design-drivers-infiniband-overview.

Iter 72 plan: drivers/input/00-overview.md (input core + evdev/joydev/mousedev + serio i8042 PS/2 + force-feedback + per-device input drivers) + net/wireless/00-overview.md (cfg80211 + mac80211 + per-driver iwlwifi/ath10k/ath11k/ath12k/mt76/rtl8xxxu/brcmfmac/etc.).
